name: live-wallpaper
description: Set a live MP4 video as your VSCode background wallpaper
author: budicuy

liveWallpaper.videoPath.markdownDescription:
Absolute path to an MP4 (H.264) video file to use as the background wallpaper.

Examples:
- **Linux/macOS**: `/home/user/videos/wallpaper.mp4`
- **Windows**: `C:\Users\user\Videos\wallpaper.mp4`
- **file:// URL**: `file:///home/user/videos/wallpaper.mp4`

liveWallpaper.opacity.markdownDescription: Opacity of the video wallpaper. Range: `0.1` (nearly transparent) to `1.0` (fully opaque). Recommended: `0.2` – `0.4`.

enumDescriptions: Scale video to fill the entire window (may crop edges)
Scale video to fit within the window (may show letterboxing)
Stretch video to fill the window (may distort aspect ratio)
liveWallpaper.size.markdownDescription: Controls how the video is sized relative to the VSCode window.

liveWallpaper.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable or disable the live wallpaper. When disabled, the video background is removed from VSCode.

liveWallpaper.loop.markdownDescription: Whether the video should loop continuously.
